assertions.evidence: Output contains ಎಲ್ಲರಾಳ್ವಿಕೆ and other Kannada script characters
Shows ಎಲ್ಲರ (everyone, genitive) + ಆಳ್ವಿಕೆ (governance) with explanation
ಪ್ರಜಾತಂತ್ರ explicitly rejected; final answer uses native roots
Uses ellaraaLvike — not proper Eke (should be ellarALvike with uppercase A for long vowel). Also lacks systematic Eke table.
